backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a game session manager with CRUD operations for game sessions, territory ownership, and unit positions stored in mutable Maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented game features (lobby, game board, movement mechanics, territory conquest) to their source files and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON catalog of short descriptions for every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's components, hooks, utilities, and pages.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH design tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Terras Ancestrais' that mounts the React app via a root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing navigation between the lobby and game views, passing configured player slots to GamePage and handling return-to-lobby resets.
frontend/src/components/CaptureProgressB: Small progress bar component that visualizes territory capture progress with team-colored fills, hiding itself when a territory is fully owned with no active capture.
frontend/src/components/GameBoard.tsx: Canvas-based game board component that renders territories with ownership colors, units with health bars and selection rings, capture progress bars, and movement range indicators.
frontend/src/components/GameLobby.tsx: Lobby screen with 8 configurable player slots split into two team columns, enforcing 4v4 balance and requiring all names to be filled before enabling the Start Game button.
frontend/src/components/GameOverScreen.t: Renders a styled game-over modal overlay displaying the winning team (Native Peoples or Colonizers) with their emblem, flavor text, and buttons to play again or return to the lobby.
frontend/src/components/GameTimer.tsx: Displays a countdown timer in MM:SS format with visual urgency states (normal, warning at ≤3 min, urgent/pulsing at ≤1 min).
frontend/src/components/PlayerSlotCard.t: A form card for configuring a single player slot, allowing the user to toggle between Bot/Player, set a name, and choose a team (NativePeoples or Colonizers).
Shows a legend panel with territory counts per faction (Native, Colonizer, Neutral) and a progress bar indicating colonizer conquest percentage.
Displays stats and action buttons (move, attack nearby enemies, fortify) for a selected game unit, with health bar and per-action disabled states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameEngine.ts: Core game engine hook managing game state, a countdown timer, territory capture logic, and bot AI ticks via intervals, with helpers to initialize and stop a game session.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, clear, status) backed by DFINITY's AuthClient, with a provider component and a consumer hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating game session data (get, create, update territory ownership, update unit position) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining a 16th-century parchment-themed CSS variable palette with light/dark modes and custom utility component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/GamePage.tsx: Main game page component that initializes a game session, renders the game board, timer, unit action panel, and handles player interactions like moving, attacking, fortifying, and ending turns.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: TypeScript type definitions for all core game entities including teams, units, territories, positions, player slots, and overall game/lobby state.
frontend/src/utils/botAI.ts: Bot AI logic that determines unit actions (move, attack, fortify) based on team strategy: Colonizers advance toward uncaptured territories while Native Peoples defend their own.
frontend/src/utils/gameInitializer.ts: Defines initial territory polygons and spawn positions, and provides functions to initialize game units for each player team along with geometry helpers (distance, point-in-polygon).
frontend/src/utils/winConditions.ts: Evaluates win conditions: Colonizers win if all territories are captured, Native Peoples win if time runs out before full conquest; also provides a colonizer progress percentage helper.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Cinzel, IM Fell English), an oklch-based color palette including game-specific colors (parchment, terracotta, gold, native-green, colonizer-red), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a 16th-century 2-team (Native Peoples vs Colonizers) strategy/action game for up to 8 players, tracking architectural notes, existing implemented features, image requirements, and known issues at schema version 1.0.0.
